records.content_snippet:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>

    <!-- Sanal POS Ana Menü -->
    <menuitem
        id="menu_sanal_pos_root"
        name="Sanal POS"
        parent="account.menu_finance_configuration"
        sequence="100"/>

    <menuitem
        id="menu_sanal_pos_installment"
        name="Taksit Yönetimi"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_root"
        sequence="10"/>

    <menuitem
        id="menu_sanal_pos_bin"
        name="BIN Veritabanı"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_root"
        sequence="20"/>

    <menuitem
        id="menu_sanal_pos_logs"
        name="İşlem Logları"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_root"
        sequence="30"/>

    <!-- Taksit Yönetimi -->
    <menuitem
        id="menu_installment_list"
        name="Taksit Tanımları"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_installment"
        action="action_sanal_pos_installment"
        sequence="10"/>

    <menuitem
        id="menu_category_rate_list"
        name="Kategori Bazlı Oranlar"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_installment"
        action="action_sanal_pos_category_rate"
        sequence="20"/>

    <!-- BIN Veritabanı -->
    <menuitem
        id="menu_bin_list"
        name="BIN Listesi"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_bin"
        action="action_sanal_pos_bin"
        sequence="10"/>

    <!-- İşlem Logları -->
    <menuitem
        id="menu_transaction_log_list"
        name="Tüm Loglar"
        parent="menu_sanal_pos_logs"
        action="action_sanal_pos_transaction_log"
        sequence="10"/>

</odoo>
